title: FTSP (Cobblemon Addon)
description: This Cobblemon Addon adds a traffic sign to make the life of Falkins easier.
body:
This Cobblemon Addon adds a traffic sign to make the life of Falkins easier.

Thanks to **Mallowu** (on the official Cobblemon Server) for the Idea behind this mod ;)
And also thanks to MCreator to which made this Mod easy to make :D

# Falinks4Ever :D
This mod is better experienced with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com 'Link to the official Cobblemon Site')
